creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Looks like, the ports r437439 changes invalidated some portions of proposed patches (even if it was just a PORTREVISION bump in a new line):
-8<--
patch -C < scintilla.diff
...
Patching file scintilla/Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 2.
1 out of 1 hunks failed while patching scintilla/Makefile
...
-->8-

I updated proposed patches because of this.
I guess, the maintainer-approval request(s) isn't required (again) for such simple additional changes.
